title: Blood Staining the Moon Scrapped Scene
display_title: Blood Staining the Moon Scrapped Scene
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 16, 2011 2:20 pm Just found something pretty cool in one of the 2.0 storyboard books (which are part of the CRC, I guess). Don't feel like making scans or shitty photos right now, so a lousy translation will have to do. This is a cut excised from the end of Misato's flashback montage. C402I 赤くなっている地球 南極＿かる血のりが吹き出している リング状にも広がっていく 血のり 広がった血のりが 月に付く しぶきも飛ぶ The Earth turning red Blood* spouts from the South Pole The blood spreads out into a ring The dissipated blood stains the Moon. The splash/spray flies up. *Literally "stage/fake blood", assuming that's what 血のり means here. Really wish they'd included this, but I guess keeping the audience trolled was more important?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:06 pm Reichi-kun, your find has just began to debunk the Sequel Theory! And it is delicious...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:12 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: Reichi-kun, your find has just began to debunk the Sequel Theory! And it is delicious...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:17 pm Perhaps Khara cut out that shot because the wanted to go another direction with how they blood reached the moon/flooded the earth? Or they somehow found it, uh, unimportant. >_> ("Trolling" is finding its way far too easily into descriptions nowadays...) Thanks anyway Reicchan, very interesting stuff!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:20 pm NAveryW wrote: Though it's been dubious from the beginning, unused material can't be considered to affect the canon. Otherwise Unit 01 would be all crumbly and have male genitalia during Near Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:07 pm I think the current sequel theory says NME's Second Impact = NGE's Third Impact, though. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:11 pm COACH wrote: I think the current sequel theory says NME's Second Impact = NGE's Third Impact, though. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:19 pm Yeah, it doesn't make much sense, but I don't think this evidence is really going to convince anybody. Obviously they'd just say that everybody's had their memories altered or whatever. But anyway, the reason people think that is because we see a black moon during NME's Second Impact. So more EoE-ish elements in the movie would just convince them even further , I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:20 pm But it isn't a Black Moon. It isn't even a concrete object. lol sequel theory

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:24 pm COACH wrote: But anyway, the reason people think that is because we see a black moon during NME's Second Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:26 pm Looks kinda like the black moon, to me. But still, lol sequel theory.

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Wed Mar 16, 2011 8:52 pm Reichu wrote: Just found something pretty cool in one of the 2.0 storyboard books (which are part of the CRC, I guess).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 16, 2011 10:40 pm COACH wrote: Looks kinda like the black moon, to me.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:14 pm Interesting, thanks for the .gif. I guess that sequel theory image that originated on /a/ needs to be corrected. Hell, maybe you should make an anti-sequel theory image with some of this information. :p Is the term "black hole" from the storyboards? That's great ammo to debunk some of this crap.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:19 pm COACH wrote: Hell, maybe you should make an anti-sequel theory image with some of this information. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:28 pm This guarantees me that Rebuild is not a sequel. Thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:36 pm Reichu wrote: Given the horrific memetic persistence of those images, it might not be a bad idea...

[]:             Quote Post by penguintruth » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:49 pm I never really bought into the "sequel" thing, anyway. I've always thought the things pointed to as evidence were simply nods to the TV series, or else intended to be explained at a later time.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Thu Mar 17, 2011 12:03 am The arguments for looked pretty decent back when 1.0 was the only movie out, but it's looking more and more unlikely as time goes on. The only things I still find strange are Kaworu's mysterious lines, but it's been suggested that NME Shinji knew him as a child or something. I bet Anno be trollin'. (Or maybe he has no idea people are interpreting things this way? Does sequel theory even exist in Japanese fandom?)

[]:             Quote Post by penguintruth » Thu Mar 17, 2011 1:31 am People always accuse Anno of "trolling", but I don't he's ever intentionally done so. Okay, so maybe a tiny bit in EoE. Just a tiny bit.

Don't feel like making scans or shitty photos right now, so a lousy translation will have to do. This is a cut excised from the end of Misato's flashback montage. C402I 赤くなっている地球 南極
